name: silybin A
mechanism: proposed mechanism based on preclinical data: antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective signaling reported in silymarin literature; no isolated-compound human mechanism is established.
contraindications: No isolated-compound clinical interaction set is established
retain herb-level caution for possible CYP2C9/CYP3A4-related interaction potential and possible warfarin interaction concerns.
